productDisplayName: Puma Kids Unisex Future Cat M2 Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, Future cat M2 shoes from puma embody excitement and energy for life. This Future Cat pair comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a denim finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-profile design made for wear and tearPremium syntehtic upper for longer wearBold formstripe outliningLightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfortAsymmetrical lacing system gives a snug FitTextile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfortSynthetic overlays on the heel cup with a denim look for maximum styleRubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorptionGerrari branding on the lateral side of the midfootMidsoleCushioned midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber outsole with an upraised heel for enhanced tractionEmbedded puma Jumping Cat embedded on the rubber outsoleshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
